message:
fix: per-agent breakdown stats silently drop NULL-agent rows

The 'Get per-agent breakdown' query in the stats command inner-joined
agents on c.agent_id and grouped by a.slug, which meant legacy
conversations with NULL agent_id never contributed to the count at all
and the reported total diverged from the top-level conversation count.
Switched to LEFT JOIN + COALESCE(a.slug, 'unknown') so those rows
collapse into a single 'unknown' bucket that sums to the real total.

Left the workspace breakdown immediately below as INNER JOIN because a
missing workspace legitimately does not belong in a workspace-slicing
report.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
